title: Padlocked
writer: Rex Beach, Becky Gardiner, James Shelley Hamilton
actors: Lois Moran, Noah Beery, Louise Dresser
plot: Edith Gilbert, the daughter of Henry Gilbert--a wealthy but bigoted and puritanical reformer--leaves home following her mother's death to seek her fortune on Broadway. Through her boardinghouse roommate, Edith gets work as a cafe ...
